name: Veils of Vail Wedding Planning & Design

reviews.text:
The BEST decision we made for our wedding!
We truly cannot say enough good things about Becca Gould and Veils of Vail. From start to finish, Becca was absolutely instrumental in planning and executing our dream wedding. Every detail came together flawlessly thanks to her incredible organization, expertise, and calm presence.

She has an amazing eye for detail, knows all the best local vendors, and helped guide us through the entire process with such grace and professionalism. She supported us through every bump along the way- always steady, encouraging, and solution-oriented. Beyond just being a phenomenal planner, Becca is truly a wonderful person to have by your side throughout the entire experience.

On my wedding day, there was a major issue with my dress due to a last-minute alteration issue, and Becca stepped in and saved the day. She calmly sewed it herself like it was no big deal. Everyone was so impressed, and I was so thankful.

We honestly would have been lost without her. If you’re considering hiring a planner-do it, and make sure it’s Becca. We are endlessly grateful for everything she did to make our day so magical.

Where do I even begin? Becca was nothing short of extraordinary throughout our wedding weekend in Vail. It was literally perfect.

From the moment things kicked off, Becca was present, attentive, and genuinely invested in making every detail perfect. Her thoughtfulness showed in ways big and small — decisions I didn't even know needed to be made were already handled, and handled beautifully. She kept everything running seamlessly across multiple events, ensuring every transition felt effortless.

But what truly set Becca apart was the way she showed up for me as the bride. She was my partner in crime the entire weekend — whenever I needed something, she was already there. I never once felt alone or overwhelmed, and that peace of mind is priceless on one of the most important weekends of your life.

Becca's warmth, kindness, and calm presence made our wedding weekend everything we dreamed it would be. I genuinely could not have done it without her. THANK YOU BECCA!

Words cannot fully capture how incredible Becca is—not just as a wedding planner, but as an exceptional human being. From the moment we began planning our wedding with Vail Resorts 1.5 years out, Becca went above and beyond to make our day truly unforgettable.

When I interviewed other planners, I never felt a genuine connection. But with Becca, it was immediately clear that she puts her heart and soul into making sure your day is perfect and beautiful. The way she advocates for her clients is remarkable, and I could go on forever. She negotiated with the venue to secure the prime ceremony time slot for us. She arranged a private tasting when no group tastings were available that worked with our schedule. She carefully reviewed vendor contracts and made thoughtful suggestions I would’ve never considered. She matched us with vendors who aligned perfectly with our personalities and vision. And—perhaps the most magical of all—she made my dream come true by shutting down a street in Vail for the carriage ride I had always imagined. Only Becca could pull that off! She truly made my fairytale wedding come true!

Beyond her logistical genius, Becca was a steady emotional anchor throughout the entire process. As a bride navigating everything largely on my own, with limited family support or experience, Becca became my rock. She would reassure me with her kind, calm voice: “Everything is going to be beautiful and perfect. Don’t worry.” And she was right—it was.

As someone who doesn’t trust easily and tends to be skeptical, I can confidently say: you can trust Becca with your heart and soul. I highly recommend investing in her Full-Service package. A planner can truly make or break your wedding experience, and Becca was everything I hoped for and more. She is, without a doubt, top tier.

As my husband and I like to say, “Spread your Gould, Becca”—because she really does spread gold everywhere she goes. And it never goes unnoticed.

HIGHLY, HIGHLY RECOMMEND Becca Gould!

How to even begin! We will always say Becca Gould, our wedding planner, was the most important person at our wedding. Our entire family would share that sentiment. She went above and beyond to make sure every detail (and there were MANY details) was organized and executed as we imagined.

We hosted our Vail wedding weekend in a very nontraditional way renting out 5 different Vail restaurants and venues that typically do not host weddings. It was not easy, but with Becca it seemed easy. With her help we transformed and personalized each venue. Becca gave us the budgets, tools, vendor relations, ideas, and her daily warmth and optimism to make it all happen.

Becca was our first text the morning after our wedding. Not only did we say THANK YOU. We also said we hope to know her for the rest of our lives. Her expertise and warmth gave us the wedding of our dreams. Take our advice and hire her! You will thank us. We plan to hire her again for any future event!

Highly recommend Veils of Vail wedding Planning & Design for your wedding planning needs. Becca, who runs the show, is phenomenal. The is so friendly, personable, and Incredibly knowledgeable!

My wife and I would have been so lost without a great planner like Becca. She kept us on track all the way throughout. Monthly meetings, great shared note taking that Becca kept organized and updated promptly made for incredibly easy planning all the way through the wedding. Becca knows so many suggestions to help a couple in any of their variety of preferences. Also Becca is a very well known preferred planner to any establishment around the towns of vail and Eagle. She’ll know exactly how to support and advocate for you in any of your venue desires.

Most importantly, Becca helps make your special day exactly for you. She’ll effectively plan to help take any stresses away from bride, groom and their families. She helps you soak in every moment that will count for you and you’ll be so thankful you had her support to make it happen! Be sure to choose veils of vail for your wedding planning needs!
